summary: Iteration 62: Bcrypt Migration & Modular Monolith Refactor Testing Complete. All critical features PASSED: (1) Bcrypt password migration working - Shannon (bcrypt) and Jacob (SHA256→bcrypt auto-migration) both login successfully, (2) Platform admin login works, (3) Cross-tenant isolation verified - Shannon sees 140 groups, Cristoviene sees 0 groups, (4) All admin endpoints work after refactor (/api/admin/groups, /api/people, /api/admin/giving/summary, /api/admin/events, /api/admin/checkin/locations, /api/admin/service-types, /api/admin/registrations/events), (5) Portal endpoints work (/api/portal/giving/history, /api/portal/events, /api/portal/groups), (6) Solomon AI chat working, (7) UI loads correctly - Login, Dashboard, People, Groups, Services, Giving pages, (8) Mobile bottom navigation with 5 tabs (Home, People, Services, Groups, Giving) working at 375px viewport.

issues: Console warning: chart width/height -1 - charts may not render correctly on initial load
React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

bcrypt_migration.details: Shannon (bcrypt hash) login successful. Jacob (SHA256 hash) login successful with auto-migration to bcrypt.

cross_tenant_isolation.details: Shannon (abundant-east-001) sees 140 groups, Cristoviene (cristoviene-church-001) sees 0 groups - no data leakage

platform_admin_isolation.details: Platform Admin (admin@solomonai.us) sees 0 groups - no tenant data exposed without tenant context

rate_limiting.details: Rate limiting active - 5 attempts per IP per 60 seconds. Tests hit rate limit during execution, confirming it works.

solomon_ai_chat.details: POST /api/solomon/chat returns AI response with member count

ui_tests.login_page: PASSED - Email/password fields, Sign In button, Google OAuth, Start Free Trial link
ui_tests.dashboard: PASSED - Greeting, stat cards, charts, sidebar navigation, Ask Solomon AI chat
ui_tests.people_page: PASSED - Members table with search, filters, Import CSV, Add Person buttons
ui_tests.groups_page: PASSED - 140 groups displayed in cards, search, Create Group button
ui_tests.services_page: PASSED - Service plans list with dates, items, status badges
ui_tests.mobile_bottom_nav: PASSED - 5 tabs visible at 375px viewport: Home, People, Services, Groups, Giving

critical_code_review_comments: Bcrypt migration working correctly - SHA256 passwords auto-migrate to bcrypt on successful login
Cross-tenant isolation properly enforced via tenant_id filtering
Modular monolith refactor successful - all endpoints work after moving models to models/schemas.py and helpers to core/__init__.py
Minor React hydration warnings in console (span inside tbody/select) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 validated the modular monolith refactor and bcrypt password migration. Key findings: (1) All 123 models successfully moved to models/schemas.py, (2) Core helpers moved to core/__init__.py, (3) server.py imports work correctly, (4) Bcrypt migration working - SHA256 passwords auto-migrate on login, (5) Cross-tenant isolation working, (6) Rate limiting active (5 per IP per 60s). Note: Rate limits are aggressive - wait 65+ seconds between test batches. MOCKED: SolomonPay payment processing, Twilio SMS (logs to DB).

mocked_apis_list: SolomonPay payment processing - all payment_status is 'pending'
Twilio SMS - logs to DB instead of sending

tests_passed: UI: Dashboard loads with greeting and stat cards
UI: People page loads with members table
UI: Groups page loads with 140 groups
UI: Services page loads with service plans
UI: Mobile bottom navigation visible at 375px with 5 tabs
